notes:
**Joint release Desktop + Managed Server 0.27.0:** First-class task dependencies, a New Task capture window, and a UX sweep.

## Task dependencies
Tasks can finally block each other. Set **Blocked by** / **Blocks** from the task detail inspector or Action Panel (⇧⌘B / ⌥⌘B), see a clear blocked indicator on rows when something's in the way, and get a confirm prompt if you try to start or complete a task that still has unfinished blockers. When a blocker finishes, open detail pages refresh live and you get an unblock notification.

**Heads-up for Summary sections:** sections filtered to priority **NOW** no longer include dependency-blocked tasks — they weren't actionable, and now the filter matches that.

## New Task capture window
⌘N (and project/milestone "+" creates) open an in-app New Task window instead of jumping straight into a blank detail page. Save & Close or Save & Open when you're ready. Quick Task still exists for always-on-top capture when Keen isn't focused, and now shows Linear-style metadata pills for status, due date, importance, effort, project, milestone, and tags.

## Context menus, ambient pause, and polish
Richer right-click menus on task and project rows (status / importance / effort / due date / dependencies / copy). Ambient capture pause is visible from the account footer and Settings — not just the tray. Settings lives in one complete submenu (⌘, goes straight to General). Escaping Quick Task / Quick Log no longer risks tearing down the whole app.

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.27.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.27.0_x64.dmg` |

Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates. Managed servers update in place via Settings → "Update your server" if prompted.
